name: plugins-folder
description: CWD-scoped visual plugins. Scans <cwd>/.yha-plugins/<plugin>/{plugin.json, tiles/<tile>/{tile.json,index.html}} and serves manifests + assets so the frontend can mount each tile as a sandboxed iframe in the header dropdown and as inline chat blocks. v1 owns GET /v1/plugins and GET /v1/plugins/asset; the watcher (SSE re-broadcast) lands in a follow-up cut. The frontend plugins-folder module is the loader and consumes these endpoints.
